creator: dohzono@axion-software.com
text:
"make all" is ok, but "make install" results in error. 

# cd /usr/ports/devel/libgii/
# make clean install
===>  Cleaning for libgii-1.0.2_2
===>  Extracting for libgii-1.0.2_2
=> MD5 Checksum OK for libgii-1.0.2.src.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for libgii-1.0.2.src.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for libgii-1.0.2_2
===>   libgii-1.0.2_2 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/x11.pc - found
===>  Configuring for libgii-1.0.2_2
(snip)
===>  Building for libgii-1.0.2_2
(snip)
===>  Installing for libgii-1.0.2_2
===>   libgii-1.0.2_2 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/x11.pc - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if devel/libgii already installed
(snip)
Making install in vgl
(snip)
if /bin/sh ../../libtool --tag=CC --mode=compile cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H  -I. -I. -I../..
-I../../include -I../../include  -DDEBUG_NAMESPACE='"libgii.input.vgl"'    -O2 -pipe
-fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -pedantic -D_REENTRANT -D_THREAD_SAFE -DDEBUG -g
-std=gnu99 -Wpointer-arith -Wsign-compare -Wstrict-prototypes -Wswitch
-Wmissing-prototypes -Wreturn-type -Wshadow -Wnested-externs -Wredundant-decls
-Wuninitialized -Wcast-qual -Wwrite-strings -Werror-implicit-function-declaration
-MT key2event.lo -MD -MP -MF ".deps/key2event.Tpo" -c -o key2event.lo key2event.c; 
then mv -f ".deps/key2event.Tpo" ".deps/key2event.Plo"; else rm -f
".deps/key2event.Tpo"; exit 1; fi
libtool: compile:  cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I../.. -I../../include
-I../../include -DDEBUG_NAMESPACE=\"libgii.input.vgl\" -O2 -pipe
-fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -pedantic -D_REENTRANT -D_THREAD_SAFE -DDEBUG -g
-std=gnu99 -Wpointer-arith -Wsign-compare -Wstrict-prototypes -Wswitch
-Wmissing-prototypes -Wreturn-type -Wshadow -Wnested-externs -Wredundant-decls
-Wuninitialized -Wcast-qual -Wwrite-strings -Werror-implicit-function-declaration
-MT key2event.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/key2event.Tpo -c key2event.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o
.libs/key2event.o
libtool: compile:  cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I../.. -I../../include
-I../../include -DDEBUG_NAMESPACE=\"libgii.input.vgl\" -O2 -pipe
-fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -pedantic -D_REENTRANT -D_THREAD_SAFE -DDEBUG -g
-std=gnu99 -Wpointer-arith -Wsign-compare -Wstrict-prototypes -Wswitch
-Wmissing-prototypes -Wreturn-type -Wshadow -Wnested-externs -Wredundant-decls
-Wuninitialized -Wcast-qual -Wwrite-strings -Werror-implicit-function-declaration
-MT key2event.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/key2event.Tpo -c key2event.c -o key2event.o

How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/devel/libgii/
# make clean install
